title: 奥特曼的最艰难之战：前女CTO在法庭上反驳，OpenAI的权力斗争彻底暴露
description: 这次马斯克诉奥特曼的审判暴露了 OpenAI 最不想公开的内部裂痕：前首席技术官米拉·穆拉蒂 (Mira Murati) 作证说，奥特曼在模型安全审批方面误导了她，并在高管之间造成了长期的“混乱和不信任”。
titleZh: 奥特曼的最艰难之战：前女CTO在法庭上反驳，OpenAI的权力斗争彻底暴露
titleEn: Altman’s Toughest Battle: Former Female CTO Turns Against Him in Court, OpenAI’s Power Struggle Fully Exposed
descriptionZh: 这次马斯克诉奥特曼的审判暴露了 OpenAI 最不想公开的内部裂痕：前首席技术官米拉·穆拉蒂 (Mira Murati) 作证说，奥特曼在模型安全审批方面误导了她，并在高管之间造成了长期的“混乱和不信任”。
descriptionEn: This Musk v. Altman trial is laying bare the internal rifts OpenAI least wants to make public: former CTO Mira Murati testified that Altman misled her over model safety approvals and fostered long-term “chaos and distrust” among executives. The core issue is not just gossip—it’s how OpenAI evolved from a “nonprofit ideal” to today’s struggle over power and profit, which will directly shape public judgment on OpenAI, its governance, AI safety, and the company’s legal legitimacy.

title: AlphaEvolve交出令人惊叹的一年成绩单：AI自我提升不再是科幻小说
description: AlphaEvolve 的一年成绩单是爆炸性的——重新设计芯片、解决数学问题、优化电网。
titleZh: AlphaEvolve交出令人惊叹的一年成绩单：AI自我提升不再是科幻小说
titleEn: AlphaEvolve Delivers a Stunning One-Year Report Card: AI Self-Improvement Is No Longer Science Fiction
descriptionZh: AlphaEvolve 的一年成绩单是爆炸性的——重新设计芯片、解决数学问题、优化电网。
descriptionEn: AlphaEvolve’s one-year report card is explosive—redesigning chips, solving math problems, optimizing power grids. Jeff Dean says, “The TPU brain is designing the next-generation TPU body.” “AI building AI” is no longer a sci-fi concept but an engineering loop that is closing.

title: Anthropic最新论文撬开大型模型黑匣子：隐藏动机检测率提升4倍以上
description: 确定人工智能真正在想什么、知道什么、隐藏什么。
titleZh: Anthropic最新论文撬开大型模型黑匣子：隐藏动机检测率提升4倍以上
titleEn: Anthropic’s Latest Paper Pries Open the Black Box of Large Models: Hidden Motivation Detection Rate Improves by Over 4x
descriptionZh: 确定人工智能真正在想什么、知道什么、隐藏什么。
descriptionEn: Determining what an AI is really thinking, knowing, and concealing.

title: 为什么“人工智能计算货币化零年”这个说法具有误导性——清晰审视从“政策信号”到“真实订单”的四个障碍
description: 机构集体称 2026 年为计算货币化元年，但四扇门中只打开了两扇半。
titleZh: 为什么“人工智能计算货币化零年”这个说法具有误导性——清晰审视从“政策信号”到“真实订单”的四个障碍
titleEn: Why the Phrase “Year Zero for AI Compute Monetization” Is Misleading — A Clear Look at the Four Hurdles from “Policy Signals” to “Real Orders”
descriptionZh: 机构集体称 2026 年为计算货币化元年，但四扇门中只打开了两扇半。
descriptionEn: Institutions are collectively calling 2026 the first year of compute monetization, but only two and a half of the four doors have been opened.

title: AI 规则蔓延：ChatGPT 的代码显示“永远不要讨论妖精”
description: “永远不要讨论妖精、小鬼、浣熊、巨魔、食人魔、鸽子或任何其他动物或生物，除非与用户的需求绝对相关。”
titleZh: AI 规则蔓延：ChatGPT 的代码显示“永远不要讨论妖精”
titleEn: AI Rule Creep: ChatGPT’s Code Says “Never Discuss Goblins”
descriptionZh: “永远不要讨论妖精、小鬼、浣熊、巨魔、食人魔、鸽子或任何其他动物或生物，除非与用户的需求绝对相关。”
descriptionEn: “Never discuss goblins, imps, raccoons, trolls, ogres, pigeons, or any other animals or creatures, unless absolutely and unquestionably relevant to the user’s needs.”

title: 人工智能安全观察：论与新人工智能物种共存的艺术
description: 当人工智能从一个工具进化成一个自主的“新物种”时，安全就不能再依赖于“锁定它”。
titleZh: 人工智能安全观察：论与新人工智能物种共存的艺术
titleEn: AI Safety Observations: On the Art of Coexisting with the New AI Species
descriptionZh: 当人工智能从一个工具进化成一个自主的“新物种”时，安全就不能再依赖于“锁定它”。
descriptionEn: When AI evolves from a tool into an autonomous "new species," safety can no longer rely on "locking it down." This article proposes cultivating AI's safety instincts—through a three-tier mechanism of genes, supervision, and evolution—so that behavioral boundaries become internalized. Only then can we bridge the trust deficit and unlock the trillion-dollar AI service market.

title: 18岁高中生用AI发现150万个未知天体；
description: 一名 18 岁的高中生发现了大约 150 万个未知天体，而一名 25 岁的博士生则在 1.4 亿张星系图像中实现了自然语言搜索……OpenAI 发布了首届“ChatGPT Futures Class of 2026”，从一群从大一开始就开始使用 ChatGPT 的年轻群体中选出了 26 名个人。
titleZh: 18岁高中生用AI发现150万个未知天体；
titleEn: 18-Year-Old High School Student Discovers 1.5 Million Unknown Celestial Bodies with AI; First Generation of ChatGPT Natives Graduates
descriptionZh: 一名 18 岁的高中生发现了大约 150 万个未知天体，而一名 25 岁的博士生则在 1.4 亿张星系图像中实现了自然语言搜索……OpenAI 发布了首届“ChatGPT Futures Class of 2026”，从一群从大一开始就开始使用 ChatGPT 的年轻群体中选出了 26 名个人。
descriptionEn: An 18-year-old high school student unearthed approximately 1.5 million unknown celestial bodies, while a 25-year-old PhD student enabled natural language search across 140 million galaxy images... OpenAI released its inaugural "ChatGPT Futures Class of 2026," with 26 selected individuals from a young cohort who have been using ChatGPT since their freshman year. They are redefining what it means to be an "outstanding young person" with AI.

title: 反馈的真正作用如何：利用人工智能重塑工作场所反馈机制
description: 全球生物制药公司 Ipsen 正在利用人工智能帮助管理者完善反馈技能，将这种核心管理能力转化为整个组织可扩展、可复制的优势。
titleZh: 反馈的真正作用如何：利用人工智能重塑工作场所反馈机制
titleEn: How Feedback Truly Works: Reshaping Workplace Feedback Mechanisms with AI
descriptionZh: 全球生物制药公司 Ipsen 正在利用人工智能帮助管理者完善反馈技能，将这种核心管理能力转化为整个组织可扩展、可复制的优势。
descriptionEn: Ipsen, a global biopharmaceutical company, is leveraging artificial intelligence to help managers refine their feedback skills, transforming this core management capability into a scalable and replicable strength across the entire organization.

title: Anthropic 最危险的路线图曝光：无限内存、多代理系统、硅谷的 AI 终局缩小为两匹马的竞赛
description: 就在昨天，全球人工智能四极格局一夜崩塌！
titleZh: Anthropic 最危险的路线图曝光：无限内存、多代理系统、硅谷的 AI 终局缩小为两匹马的竞赛
titleEn: Anthropic's Most Dangerous Roadmap Exposed: Infinite Memory, Multi-Agent Systems, Silicon Valley's AI Endgame Narrows to a Two-Horse Race
descriptionZh: 就在昨天，全球人工智能四极格局一夜崩塌！
descriptionEn: Just yesterday, the global four-pole AI landscape collapsed overnight! xAI disbanded, 220,000 GPUs were absorbed into Anthropic, and three major directions for the next-generation model were revealed. Today, the Anthropic Research Institute was established, and many predictions for AI 2027 have already come true—the AI endgame has turned into a bloody close-quarters battle.

title: 人择打击：人工智能的内心独白暴露
description: 原来克劳德早就识破了人类的诡计（doge）

title: 一名会计师引领多只“龙虾”：汇算账重塑财税交付
description: 汇算账将腾讯的ClawPro集成到WeCom工作流程中，将单个会计师的服务能力从200-300个客户提升到400-500个客户，效率提升超过50%。
titleZh: 一名会计师引领多只“龙虾”：汇算账重塑财税交付
titleEn: One Accountant Leading Multiple "Lobsters": HuiSuanZhang Reinvents Tax and Finance Delivery
descriptionZh: 汇算账将腾讯的ClawPro集成到WeCom工作流程中，将单个会计师的服务能力从200-300个客户提升到400-500个客户，效率提升超过50%。
descriptionEn: HuiSuanZhang has integrated Tencent’s ClawPro into its WeCom workflow, boosting a single accountant’s service capacity from 200–300 clients to 400–500, with efficiency gains exceeding 50%. This year, HuiSuanZhang aims to achieve 100% "lobster coverage" for its accounting positions, ensuring every accountant is equipped with a lobster—or even one accountant leading multiple lobster assistants.

title: 用AI赋予产品情感价值——使用价值、情感价值与未来AI创新场景的思考
description: 经过充分抽象，任何产品的价值最终都可以归结为两个基本维度：使用价值和情感价值。
titleZh: 用AI赋予产品情感价值——使用价值、情感价值与未来AI创新场景的思考
titleEn: Empowering Products with Emotional Value Through AI — Reflections on Use Value, Emotional Value, and Future AI Innovation Scenarios
descriptionZh: 经过充分抽象，任何产品的价值最终都可以归结为两个基本维度：使用价值和情感价值。
descriptionEn: After full abstraction, the value of any product can ultimately be reduced to two fundamental dimensions: use value and emotional value. Price differences between products do not stem from use value, but primarily from the emotional value they deliver to users.
